content.text:
I don’t see the reference text yet. Please paste the stable reference text you want summarized. If it’s long, feel free to send it in chunks.

I can return the summary in several formats (pick what you prefer):

- One-sentence summary
- Executive summary (2–4 sentences)
- Key-points bullets (top 5–10 points)
- Detailed bullet list (structured, with sections for purpose, scope, findings, conclusions)
- Cacheable context card (compact data sheet)

Cacheable context card template (you can copy this to store and reuse):

- Title:
- Source/Author:
- Date:
- Purpose:
- Scope:
- Key Concepts:
- Summary (1–2 sentences):
- Key Points (bullets):
- Metrics/Evidence:
- Conclusions:
- Assumptions/Limitations:
- Keywords:

Once you provide the text, I’ll generate the summary in your chosen format and treat it as the cacheable context for this session.
